title: Tsunami Warning or Signs
symptoms: Felt a strong earthquake near the coast
Loud roaring sound from the ocean
immediate_steps: Do not wait for an official warning if you feel a strong earthquake; evacuate immediately
Move to higher ground (at least 100 feet above sea level) or go inland as far as possible (at least 2 miles)
If trapped, climb to the highest floor or roof of a sturdy, reinforced concrete building
If swept into the water, grab onto a floating object (raft, tree trunk, door)
avoid: Do not go to the beach to watch the waves
Do not assume the danger is over after one wave (tsunamis are a series of waves, and later waves can be larger)
